subcodes.first_line: O Friends of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! Let us thank God that He has made from this prison a palace for the friends, and from this exalted dungeon, the garden of Baha’u’llah's bounties! …All that is revealed through divine inspiration is the evident truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد خدا را که این زندانرا بهر یاران ایوان فرمود و این سجن اعظم را گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @religion as source; stimulus of knowledge and science, @Muhammad; Islam, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @imagery in the Qur'an, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @consolation and comfort, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
